final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 vertical 9-grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) platform, designed for clean cutting into 9 individual posts.

Style/medium: needs an "ins风" (Instagram aesthetic) with gentle, healing sleep-therapy visual direction — exact illustration style and texture treatment are yours
Composition: must be a standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows) with clear boundaries between each cell, each cell self-contained and centered, no text near cut lines, visible spacing or thin borders between cells for clean post-production slicing
Subject: must include soft bedding, moon, pillow, eye mask, phone, bedside lamp, curtains, air conditioner, thermometer, blanket, coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol, bathroom steam, towel, hot water, notebook, pen, small desk lamp, clock, breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars, hot milk, aromatherapy, book — arranged across 9 cells as specified
Scene/backdrop: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant with minimal dark brown text — exact hex values are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a gentle, soothing, sleep-healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel dominant with minimal dark brown text accents
Materials/textures: needs a light skeuomorphic illustration treatment with soft, premium paper-like surfaces — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as follows, large and readable in each cell:
  Cell 1 (cover): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" (large title), "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" (subtitle)
  Cell 2: "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" (title), "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" (body)
  Cell 3: "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" (title), "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" (body)
  Cell 4: "3. 房间温度别太高" (title), "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" (body)
  Cell 5: "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" (title), "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" (body)
  Cell 6: "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" (title), "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" (body)
  Cell 7: "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" (title), "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" (body)
  Cell 8: "7. 固定上床时间" (title), "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" (body)
  Cell 9: "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" (title), "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" (body), "收藏这组，今晚试试看" (footer small text)
Constraints: must preserve 3:4 vertical aspect ratio, 9-grid structure with clear cell boundaries, all 9 cells visually unified in style, each cell must work as standalone Xiaohongshu post, professional new media design aesthetic, magazine-quality layout, generous white space, no text near grid lines, all text in Chinese only
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, over-decoration, cluttered layouts, English text, garbled characters, text overlapping grid boundaries
